WITH RECURSIVE budget_calc AS (
    -- Start with no items purchased
    SELECT 
        0 AS total_quantity,
        100 AS remaining_budget,
        (SELECT MIN(cost) FROM items WHERE cost <= 100) AS current_cost,
        0 AS items_bought_of_current
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT
        bc.total_quantity + 1,
        bc.remaining_budget - bc.current_cost,
        bc.current_cost,
        bc.items_bought_of_current + 1
    FROM budget_calc bc
    JOIN items i ON i.cost = bc.current_cost
    WHERE bc.remaining_budget >= bc.current_cost
      AND bc.items_bought_of_current < i.quantity
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT
        bc.total_quantity,
        bc.remaining_budget,
        (SELECT MIN(i2.cost) FROM items i2 WHERE i2.cost <= bc.remaining_budget AND i2.cost > bc.current_cost),
        0
    FROM budget_calc bc
    JOIN items i ON i.cost = bc.current_cost
    WHERE (bc.items_bought_of_current >= i.quantity OR bc.remaining_budget < bc.current_cost)
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM items i2 WHERE i2.cost <= bc.remaining_budget AND i2.cost > bc.current_cost)
)
SELECT MAX(total_quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM budget_calc

WITH card_activity AS (
    SELECT 
        SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(fe.start_date_key AS INTEGER) AS TEXT), 1, 4) || '-' || 
        SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(fe.start_date_key AS INTEGER) AS TEXT), 5, 2) || '-' || 
        SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(fe.start_date_key AS INTEGER) AS TEXT), 7, 2) AS start_date,
        CASE WHEN fe.end_date_key IS NOT NULL THEN 
            SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(fe.end_date_key AS INTEGER) AS TEXT), 1, 4) || '-' || 
            SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(fe.end_date_key AS INTEGER) AS TEXT), 5, 2) || '-' || 
            SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(fe.end_date_key AS INTEGER) AS TEXT), 7, 2)
        END AS end_date,
        dp.set_name,
        dp.set_code,
        fe.card_key
    FROM fact_collection AS fe
    INNER JOIN dim_set AS dp ON fe.set_key = dp.set_key
),
months AS (
    SELECT '2023-01-01' AS month_date
    UNION ALL
    SELECT date(month_date, '+1 month')
    FROM months
    WHERE month_date < '2024-12-01'
)
SELECT 
    SUBSTR(m.month_date, 1, 7) AS month,
    ca.set_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ca.card_key) AS existing_cards
FROM months AS m
LEFT JOIN card_activity AS ca 
    ON ca.start_date < date(m.month_date, '+1 month')
    AND (ca.end_date IS NULL OR ca.end_date >= m.month_date)
GROUP BY m.month_date, ca.set_name
ORDER BY m.month_date, ca.set_name

WITH ordered_missions AS (
    SELECT 
        hero_id, 
        mission_start, 
        mission_end,
        LAG(mission_end) OVER (PARTITION BY hero_id ORDER BY mission_start, mission_end) AS prev_end
    FROM superhero_missions
),
span_flags AS (
    SELECT 
        hero_id,
        mission_start,
        mission_end,
        CASE 
            WHEN prev_end IS NULL OR mission_start != prev_end THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS new_span_flag
    FROM ordered_missions
),
span_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        hero_id,
        mission_start,
        mission_end,
        SUM(new_span_flag) OVER (PARTITION BY hero_id ORDER BY mission_start, mission_end) AS span_id
    FROM span_flags
)
SELECT 
    hero_id,
    MIN(mission_start) AS mission_start,
    MAX(mission_end) AS mission_end
FROM span_groups
GROUP BY hero_id, span_id
ORDER BY hero_id, mission_start

WITH hero_attribute_data AS (
    SELECT 1 AS hero_id, 1 AS attribute_id, 80 AS year1, 80 AS year2, 80 AS year3, NULL AS year4, 80 AS year5
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 2, 2, 90, 85, 90, 88, 90
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 3, 3, 75, 70, NULL, 75, 75
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 4, 4, NULL, 60, 60, 60, NULL
),
score_check AS (
    SELECT *,
        MAX(
            COALESCE(year1, 0),
            COALESCE(year2, 0),
            COALESCE(year3, 0),
            COALESCE(year4, 0),
            COALESCE(year5, 0)
        ) AS max_score,
        CASE
            WHEN year1 IS NULL OR year2 IS NULL OR year3 IS NULL OR year4 IS NULL OR year5 IS NULL THEN 0
            WHEN year1 <> MAX(COALESCE(year1, 0), COALESCE(year2, 0), COALESCE(year3, 0), COALESCE(year4, 0), COALESCE(year5, 0))
              OR year2 <> MAX(COALESCE(year1, 0), COALESCE(year2, 0), COALESCE(year3, 0), COALESCE(year4, 0), COALESCE(year5, 0))
              OR year3 <> MAX(COALESCE(year1, 0), COALESCE(year2, 0), COALESCE(year3, 0), COALESCE(year4, 0), COALESCE(year5, 0))
              OR year4 <> MAX(COALESCE(year1, 0), COALESCE(year2, 0), COALESCE(year3, 0), COALESCE(year4, 0), COALESCE(year5, 0))
              OR year5 <> MAX(COALESCE(year1, 0), COALESCE(year2, 0), COALESCE(year3, 0), COALESCE(year4, 0), COALESCE(year5, 0))
            THEN 0
            ELSE 1
        END AS is_a_match
    FROM hero_attribute_data
)
SELECT * FROM score_check WHERE is_a_match = 0

WITH partial AS (
    SELECT 
        item_id,
        item_price AS retail_price,
        SUM(COALESCE(uses_item_price * quantity, 0) + COALESCE(resource_price * quantity, 0)) AS partial_craft_price
    FROM store
    GROUP BY item_id, item_price
),
-- Recursive CTE to resolve full craft cost
-- Base case: resources (leaf nodes) contribute their resource_price * quantity
-- Recursive case: sub-items (uses_item_id) are expanded into their own components
full_craft AS (
    -- Base: start from each item's direct components
    SELECT 
        s.item_id AS root_item_id,
        s.item_id AS current_item_id,
        s.quantity AS cumulative_quantity,
        s.uses_item_id,
        s.resource_id,
        s.resource_price
    FROM store s

    UNION ALL

    -- Recurse: expand uses_item_id into its own components
    SELECT 
        fc.root_item_id,
        s.item_id AS current_item_id,
        fc.cumulative_quantity * s.quantity AS cumulative_quantity,
        s.uses_item_id,
        s.resource_id,
        s.resource_price
    FROM full_craft fc
    JOIN store s ON fc.uses_item_id = s.item_id
    WHERE fc.uses_item_id IS NOT NULL
),
full_price AS (
    SELECT 
        root_item_id AS item_id,
        SUM(COALESCE(resource_price * cumulative_quantity, 0)) AS full_craft_price
    FROM full_craft
    WHERE resource_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY root_item_id
)
SELECT 
    p.item_id,
    p.retail_price,
    p.partial_craft_price,
    COALESCE(f.full_craft_price, p.partial_craft_price) AS full_craft_price
FROM partial p
LEFT JOIN full_price f ON p.item_id = f.item_id
ORDER BY p.item_id

    -- Start from the parent of the given atom
    SELECT c.atom_id, c.parent_id, c.enabled
    FROM connection AS c

    UNION ALL
    -- Recursively find each ancestor's parent
    SELECT c.atom_id, c.parent_id, c.enabled
    FROM connection AS c
    INNER JOIN atom_ancestors AS aa ON c.atom_id = aa.parent_id
    WHERE aa.parent_id IS NOT NULL
)

FROM atom_ancestors
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM atom_ancestors WHERE enabled = 0
)

WITH RECURSIVE ManagerChain AS (
    -- Base case: start from each employee, go to their direct boss
    SELECT 
        e.id AS employeeId,
        e.salary AS employeeSalary,
        e.bossid AS currentBossId,
        1 AS level
    FROM staff e
    WHERE e.bossid IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL

    -- Recursive step: walk up the hierarchy
    SELECT 
        mc.employeeId,
        mc.employeeSalary,
        s.bossid AS currentBossId,
        mc.level + 1 AS level
    FROM ManagerChain mc
    INNER JOIN staff s ON mc.currentBossId = s.id
    WHERE s.bossid IS NOT NULL
),
IndirectManagers AS (
    -- Join to get boss salary, filter for indirect managers (level >= 2)
    SELECT 
        mc.employeeId,
        mc.employeeSalary,
        mc.level AS hierarchical_level,
        mc.currentBossId AS bossId,
        s.salary AS bossSalary
    FROM ManagerChain mc
    INNER JOIN staff s ON mc.currentBossId = s.id
    WHERE mc.level >= 2
      AND s.salary >= 2 * mc.employeeSalary
),
RankedIndirectManagers AS (
    -- Pick the lowest-ranked (closest) indirect manager meeting the condition
    SELECT 
        employeeId,
        employeeSalary,
        hierarchical_level,
        bossId,
        bossSalary,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY employeeId ORDER BY hierarchical_level ASC) AS rn
    FROM IndirectManagers
)
SELECT 
    employeeId,
    employeeSalary,
    hierarchical_level,
    bossId,
    bossSalary
FROM RankedIndirectManagers
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY employeeId

WITH hero_attribute AS (
    SELECT column1 as hero_id, column2 as attribute_type, column3 as attribute_value 
    FROM (VALUES (1, 1, 80), (2, 1, 75), (3, 1, 95), (4, 1, 85), (5, 1, 90), (6, 1, 70))
),
base_groups AS (
    SELECT (hero_id - 1) / 2 AS grp,
           MIN(hero_id) AS grp_min,
           MAX(hero_id) AS grp_max
    FROM hero_attribute
    GROUP BY (hero_id - 1) / 2
),
expanded AS (
    SELECT bg.grp,
           SUM(ha.attribute_value) AS sum
    FROM base_groups bg
    JOIN hero_attribute ha
      ON ha.hero_id >= bg.grp_min - 2
     AND ha.hero_id <= bg.grp_max + 2
    GROUP BY bg.grp
)
SELECT sum FROM expanded ORDER BY grp

CREATE TRIGGER after_insert_team_attributes
AFTER INSERT ON Team_Attributes
FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    -- Update the eff_to of the newly inserted row to the next date for the same team, or '5999-12-31' if none
    UPDATE Team_Attributes
    SET eff_to = COALESCE(
        (SELECT date
         FROM Team_Attributes
         WHERE team_api_id = NEW.team_api_id
           AND date > NEW.date
         ORDER BY date ASC
         LIMIT 1),
        '5999-12-31')
    WHERE id = NEW.id;

    -- Update the eff_to of the previous record for the same team to point to the newly inserted date
    UPDATE Team_Attributes
    SET eff_to = NEW.date
    WHERE team_api_id = NEW.team_api_id
      AND date < NEW.date
      AND id != NEW.id
      AND date = (
          SELECT MAX(date)
          FROM Team_Attributes
          WHERE team_api_id = NEW.team_api_id
            AND date < NEW.date
            AND id != NEW.id
      );
END

WITH RECURSIVE
fill_pass AS (
    SELECT 0 AS pass_num
    UNION ALL
    SELECT pass_num + 1 FROM fill_pass WHERE pass_num < (SELECT MAX(LENGTH(id)) FROM superhero2)
),
bottom_up AS (
    -- Base case: nodes that already have a color (leaves)
    SELECT id, parent_id, color, LENGTH(id) AS depth
    FROM superhero2
    WHERE color IS NOT NULL
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive case: a parent whose ALL children are already colored
    SELECT 
        p.id,
        p.parent_id,
        CASE
            WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bu.color) FROM bottom_up bu WHERE bu.parent_id = p.id) = 1
            THEN (SELECT bu.color FROM bottom_up bu WHERE bu.parent_id = p.id LIMIT 1)
            ELSE 'gray'
        END,
        LENGTH(p.id)
    FROM superhero2 p
    JOIN bottom_up bu ON bu.parent_id = p.id
    WHERE p.color IS NULL
    GROUP BY p.id, p.parent_id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT bu.id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero2 ch WHERE ch.parent_id = p.id)
)
UPDATE superhero2
SET color = (SELECT bu.color FROM bottom_up bu WHERE bu.id = superhero2.id)
WHERE superhero2.color IS NULL

WITH ordered AS (

        ts,
        superhero_id,
        activity_code,
        LAG(ts) OVER (PARTITION BY superhero_id ORDER BY ts) AS prev_ts,

    FROM superhero_activities
),
grouped AS (
    SELECT
        ts,
        superhero_id,
        activity_code,
        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN prev_activity_code IS NULL
                     OR prev_activity_code != activity_code
                     OR (julianday(ts) - julianday(prev_ts)) * 24 * 60 > 5
                THEN 1
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) OVER (PARTITION BY superhero_id ORDER BY ts) AS grp
    FROM ordered
)
SELECT
    superhero_id,
    activity_code,
    MIN(ts) AS interval_start,
    MAX(ts) AS interval_end,

ORDER BY superhero_id, interval_start

WITH RECURSIVE split_keywords AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id,
        TRIM(SUBSTR(c.keywords, 1, 
            CASE WHEN INSTR(c.keywords, ',') = 0 THEN LENGTH(c.keywords) 
                 ELSE INSTR(c.keywords, ',') - 1 END)) AS keyword,
        CASE WHEN INSTR(c.keywords, ',') = 0 THEN '' 
             ELSE SUBSTR(c.keywords, INSTR(c.keywords, ',') + 1) END AS remaining,
        c.keywords AS original_keywords
    FROM cards c
    JOIN SelectQuery sq ON c.id = sq.id
    WHERE c.keywords IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL

    SELECT 
        id,
        TRIM(SUBSTR(remaining, 1, 
            CASE WHEN INSTR(remaining, ',') = 0 THEN LENGTH(remaining) 
                 ELSE INSTR(remaining, ',') - 1 END)) AS keyword,
        CASE WHEN INSTR(remaining, ',') = 0 THEN '' 
             ELSE SUBSTR(remaining, INSTR(remaining, ',') + 1) END AS remaining,
        original_keywords
    FROM split_keywords
    WHERE remaining != ''
),
split_remove AS (
    SELECT 
        sq.id,
        TRIM(SUBSTR(sq.RemoveKeywords, 1, 
            CASE WHEN INSTR(sq.RemoveKeywords, ',') = 0 THEN LENGTH(sq.RemoveKeywords) 
                 ELSE INSTR(sq.RemoveKeywords, ',') - 1 END)) AS remove_kw,
        CASE WHEN INSTR(sq.RemoveKeywords, ',') = 0 THEN '' 
             ELSE SUBSTR(sq.RemoveKeywords, INSTR(sq.RemoveKeywords, ',') + 1) END AS remaining
    FROM SelectQuery sq
    WHERE sq.RemoveKeywords IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL

    SELECT 
        id,
        TRIM(SUBSTR(remaining, 1, 
            CASE WHEN INSTR(remaining, ',') = 0 THEN LENGTH(remaining) 
                 ELSE INSTR(remaining, ',') - 1 END)) AS remove_kw,
        CASE WHEN INSTR(remaining, ',') = 0 THEN '' 
             ELSE SUBSTR(remaining, INSTR(remaining, ',') + 1) END AS remaining
    FROM split_remove
    WHERE remaining != ''
),
filtered AS (
    SELECT sk.id, sk.keyword
    FROM split_keywords sk
    WHERE sk.keyword != ''
      AND NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM split_remove sr 
          WHERE sr.id = sk.id AND TRIM(sr.remove_kw) = TRIM(sk.keyword)
      )
)
SELECT 
    c.id,
    COALESCE(f.updated_keywords, '') AS updated_keywords
FROM cards c
JOIN SelectQuery sq ON c.id = sq.id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT id, GROUP_CONCAT(keyword, ',') AS updated_keywords
    FROM filtered
    GROUP BY id
) f ON c.id = f.id
WHERE c.keywords IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.id

SELECT
  id,
  (COALESCE(circui_name_A1, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(circui_name_A2, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(circui_name_A3, '')) AS A,
  (COALESCE(circui_name_B1, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(circui_name_B2, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(circui_name_B3, '')) AS B,
  (
    SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(name, ' ') FROM (
      SELECT name FROM (
        SELECT COALESCE(ri.circui_name_A1, '') AS name
        UNION ALL
        SELECT COALESCE(ri.circui_name_A2, '')
        UNION ALL
        SELECT COALESCE(ri.circui_name_A3, '')
      )
      WHERE name != ''
      ORDER BY name
    )
  ) AS sorted_A,
  (
    SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(name, ' ') FROM (
      SELECT name FROM (
        SELECT COALESCE(ri.circui_name_B1, '') AS name
        UNION ALL
        SELECT COALESCE(ri.circui_name_B2, '')
        UNION ALL
        SELECT COALESCE(ri.circui_name_B3, '')
      )
      WHERE name != ''
      ORDER BY name
    )
  ) AS sorted_B,
  CASE
    WHEN (
      SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(name, ' ') FROM (
        SELECT name FROM (
          SELECT COALESCE(ri.circui_name_A1, '') AS name
          UNION ALL
          SELECT COALESCE(ri.circui_name_A2, '')
          UNION ALL
          SELECT COALESCE(ri.circui_name_A3, '')
        )
        WHERE name != ''
        ORDER BY name
      )
    ) = (
      SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(name, ' ') FROM (
        SELECT name FROM (
          SELECT COALESCE(ri.circui_name_B1, '') AS name
          UNION ALL
          SELECT COALESCE(ri.circui_name_B2, '')
          UNION ALL
          SELECT COALESCE(ri.circui_name_B3, '')
        )
        WHERE name != ''
        ORDER BY name
      )
    ) THEN 'Match'
    ELSE 'Discrepancy'
  END AS comparison_result
FROM race_info ri

WITH daily_first AS (
    -- Get the first price record for each card on each day
    SELECT 
        card_id,
        DATE(date_value) AS dt,
        MIN(date_value) AS first_time
    FROM card_prices
    GROUP BY card_id, DATE(date_value)
),
first_price AS (
    -- Get the actual first price
    SELECT 
        df.card_id,
        df.dt,
        df.first_time,
        cp.price AS open_price
    FROM daily_first df
    JOIN card_prices cp 
        ON cp.card_id = df.card_id 
        AND cp.date_value = df.first_time
),
last_within_15 AS (
    -- Get the last price within 15 minutes of the first price
    SELECT 
        fp.card_id,
        fp.dt,
        fp.open_price,
        cp.price AS close_15_price
    FROM first_price fp
    JOIN card_prices cp 
        ON cp.card_id = fp.card_id 
        AND cp.date_value >= fp.first_time
        AND cp.date_value <= DATETIME(fp.first_time, '+15 minutes')
    WHERE cp.date_value = (
        SELECT MAX(cp2.date_value)
        FROM card_prices cp2
        WHERE cp2.card_id = fp.card_id
          AND cp2.date_value >= fp.first_time
          AND cp2.date_value <= DATETIME(fp.first_time, '+15 minutes')
    )
)
SELECT 
    card_id,
    AVG(close_15_price - open_price) AS avg_difference
FROM last_within_15
GROUP BY card_id
ORDER BY card_id

SELECT 
    td.years,
    sd.name AS country,
    pt.name AS product_type,
    pl.name AS publishing_language,
    g.name AS genre,
    COALESCE(SUM(dp.value), 0) AS total_sales
FROM time_dimension td
CROSS JOIN spatial_dimension sd
CROSS JOIN (SELECT id, name FROM variablevalue WHERE variable_id = (SELECT id FROM variable WHERE name = 'ProductType')) pt
CROSS JOIN (SELECT id, name FROM variablevalue WHERE variable_id = (SELECT id FROM variable WHERE name = 'publishing_language')) pl
CROSS JOIN (SELECT id, name FROM variablevalue WHERE variable_id = (SELECT id FROM variable WHERE name = 'genre')) g
LEFT JOIN datapoints dp 
    ON dp.time_dimension_id = td.id 
    AND dp.spatial_dimension_id = sd.id
LEFT JOIN datapoint_variablevalue dpvv_pt 
    ON dpvv_pt.datapoint_id = dp.id 
    AND dpvv_pt.variablevalue_id = pt.id
LEFT JOIN datapoint_variablevalue dpvv_pl 
    ON dpvv_pl.datapoint_id = dp.id 
    AND dpvv_pl.variablevalue_id = pl.id
LEFT JOIN datapoint_variablevalue dpvv_g

WITH RECURSIVE split_tokens AS (
    SELECT 
        match_id,
        events AS remaining,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(events, '#') > 0 THEN SUBSTR(events, 1, INSTR(events, '#') - 1)
            ELSE events
        END AS token,
        1 AS position
    FROM match_events
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        match_id,
        SUBSTR(remaining, INSTR(remaining, '#') + 1),
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(remaining, INSTR(remaining, '#') + 1), '#') > 0 
            THEN SUBSTR(SUBSTR(remaining, INSTR(remaining, '#') + 1), 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(remaining, INSTR(remaining, '#') + 1), '#') - 1)
            ELSE SUBSTR(remaining, INSTR(remaining, '#') + 1)
        END,
        position + 1
    FROM split_tokens
    WHERE INSTR(remaining, '#') > 0
),
common_tokens AS (
    SELECT position, token
    FROM split_tokens
    GROUP BY position
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT token) = 1
      AND COUNT(*) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM match_events)
),
max_consecutive AS (
    SELECT MAX(position) AS max_pos
    FROM common_tokens ct
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM common_tokens ct2 
        WHERE ct2.position < ct.position 
        AND ct2.position NOT IN (SELECT position FROM common_tokens)
    )
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM (SELECT position AS p FROM common_tokens) gaps
        WHERE gaps.p < ct.position
        AND gaps.p + 1 NOT IN (SELECT position FROM common_tokens)
    )
),
prefix_tokens AS (
    SELECT ct.position, ct.token
    FROM common_tokens ct
    WHERE ct.position <= (
        SELECT COALESCE(MIN(s.position) - 1, (SELECT MAX(position) FROM common_tokens))
        FROM split_tokens s
        GROUP BY s.position
        HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT s.token) > 1 OR COUNT(*) < (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM match_events)
    )
)
SELECT COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(token, '#'), '') AS longest_common_prefix
FROM prefix_tokens
ORDER BY position

DROP INDEX IF EXISTS conditional_unique_index;

-- Trigger to enforce condition 1: same match_id and team_id must have the same score
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS enforce_same_score_for_same_match_team
BEFORE INSERT ON match_results
FOR EACH ROW
WHEN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM match_results
    WHERE match_id = NEW.match_id
      AND team_id = NEW.team_id
      AND score != NEW.score
)
BEGIN
    SELECT RAISE(ABORT, 'Score must be the same for duplicate match_id and team_id');
END;

-- Trigger to enforce condition 2: if match_id and team_id is unique, score must be unique across different matches
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS enforce_unique_score_for_unique_match_team
BEFORE INSERT ON match_results
FOR EACH ROW
WHEN NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM match_results
    WHERE match_id = NEW.match_id
      AND team_id = NEW.team_id
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM match_results mr
    WHERE mr.score = NEW.score
      AND NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM match_results mr2
          WHERE mr2.match_id = mr.match_id
            AND mr2.team_id = mr.team_id
            AND mr2.rowid != mr.rowid
      )
)
BEGIN
    SELECT RAISE(ABORT, 'Score must be unique for unique match_id and team_id combinations');
END

WITH RECURSIVE all_dates AS (
    -- Anchor: start from the start_date
    SELECT 
        b.id AS budget_id,
        b.rate,
        DATE(b.time_span_start) AS start_date,
        DATE(b.time_span_start) AS current_date,
        CASE 
            WHEN b.time_span_end IS NULL OR b.time_span_end = '' 
            THEN DATE('now') 
            ELSE DATE(b.time_span_end) 
        END AS end_date
    FROM budgets b
    UNION ALL
    -- Recursive: add one day at a time
    SELECT 
        budget_id,
        rate,
        start_date,
        DATE(current_date, '+1 day'),
        end_date
    FROM all_dates
    WHERE DATE(current_date, '+1 day') < end_date
),
date_with_periods AS (
    SELECT
        ad.budget_id,
        ad.rate,
        ad.current_date,
        ad.start_date,
        -- Determine how many full months from start_date to current_date
        -- Find the largest N such that DATE(start_date, '+N months') <= current_date
        CASE
            WHEN ad.current_date >= DATE(ad.start_date, 
                '+' || (
                    (CAST(strftime('%Y', ad.current_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', ad.start_date) AS INTEGER)) * 12 
                    + (CAST(strftime('%m', ad.current_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%m', ad.start_date) AS INTEGER))
                ) || ' months')
            THEN (CAST(strftime('%Y', ad.current_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', ad.start_date) AS INTEGER)) * 12 
                 + (CAST(strftime('%m', ad.current_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%m', ad.start_date) AS INTEGER))
            ELSE (CAST(strftime('%Y', ad.current_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', ad.start_date) AS INTEGER)) * 12 
                 + (CAST(strftime('%m', ad.current_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%m', ad.start_date) AS INTEGER)) - 1
        END AS months_offset
    FROM all_dates ad
),
date_with_period_bounds AS (
    SELECT
        dp.budget_id,
        dp.rate,
        dp.current_date,
        DATE(dp.start_date, '+' || dp.months_offset || ' months') AS period_start,
        DATE(dp.start_date, '+' || (dp.months_offset + 1) || ' months') AS period_end
    FROM date_with_periods dp
)
SELECT
    dpb.current_date AS date,
    ROUND(CAST(dpb.rate AS REAL) / (julianday(dpb.period_end) - julianday(dpb.period_start)), 2) AS daily_rate
FROM date_with_period_bounds dpb
ORDER BY dpb.budget_id, dpb.current_date

WITH RECURSIVE curricula_to_upgrade AS (

  FROM curricula

  SELECT cr2.curriculum_id
  FROM curricula_to_upgrade ctu
  JOIN curriculum_resources cr1 ON cr1.curriculum_id = ctu.curriculum_id
  JOIN curriculum_resources cr2 ON cr2.resource_key = cr1.resource_key

  WHERE c.status = 'installed'

WITH RECURSIVE date_range AS (
    -- Generate one row per day that each event spans
    SELECT 
        learner_code,
        resource_key,
        start_timestamp,
        end_timestamp,
        date(start_timestamp) AS day
    FROM event_usage
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        learner_code,
        resource_key,
        start_timestamp,
        end_timestamp,
        date(day, '+1 day')
    FROM date_range
    WHERE date(day, '+1 day') <= date(end_timestamp)
),
daily_overlap AS (
    SELECT
        learner_code,
        resource_key,
        day,
        -- Working window start and end for this day
        datetime(day || ' 09:00:00') AS work_start,
        datetime(day || ' 18:00:00') AS work_end,
        -- Effective event start on this day
        MAX(datetime(start_timestamp), datetime(day || ' 09:00:00')) AS eff_start,
        -- Effective event end on this day
        MIN(datetime(end_timestamp), datetime(day || ' 18:00:00')) AS eff_end
    FROM date_range
    WHERE strftime('%w', day) NOT IN ('0', '6')  -- Exclude weekends (0=Sunday, 6=Saturday)
)
SELECT
    learner_code,
    resource_key,
    SUM(
        CASE 
            WHEN eff_end > eff_start 
            THEN CAST((julianday(eff_end) - julianday(eff_start)) * 86400 AS INTEGER)
            ELSE 0
        END
    ) AS total_working_seconds
FROM daily_overlap
GROUP BY learner_code, resource_key
ORDER BY learner_code, resource_key

)
SELECT
    dd AS day_start,
    COALESCE(
        SUM(
            CAST(
                (julianday(
                    MIN(T.incident_end, DATETIME(dd, '+1 day'))
                ) - julianday(
                    MAX(T.incident_start, DATETIME(dd))
                )) * 1440
            AS INTEGER)
        ),
        0
    ) AS incident_minutes
FROM date_series

                     ELSE 8 - CAST(strftime('%w', strftime('%Y-%m-01', Date)) AS INTEGER)

WITH food_budget AS (

        SUM(amount) OVER (ORDER BY amount ASC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cum_amount
    FROM budget
    WHERE category = 'Food'
),
affordable_food AS (
    SELECT 
        budget_id, 
        category, 
        amount, 
        cum_amount
    FROM food_budget
    WHERE cum_amount <= 500
),
remaining_budget AS (
    SELECT 500 - COALESCE(MAX(cum_amount), 0) AS leftover
    FROM affordable_food
),
ad_budget AS (
    SELECT 
        budget_id, 
        category, 
        amount,
        SUM(amount) OVER (ORDER BY amount ASC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cum_amount
    FROM budget
    WHERE category = 'Advertisement'
),
affordable_ad AS (
    SELECT 
        a.budget_id, 
        a.category, 
        a.amount, 
        a.cum_amount + (500 - r.leftover) AS cum_amount
    FROM ad_budget a
    CROSS JOIN remaining_budget r
    WHERE a.cum_amount <= r.leftover
)
SELECT budget_id, category, amount, cum_amount
FROM affordable_food
UNION ALL
SELECT budget_id, category, amount, cum_amount
FROM affordable_ad
ORDER BY category DESC, amount ASC

       c.Segment AS CustomerSegment, c.Currency,

LEFT JOIN gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID

WITH buys AS (
    SELECT 
        molecule_id,
        date,
        molecules,
        usd_total,
        SUM(molecules) OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY date, transaction_id) - molecules AS cum_start,
        SUM(molecules) OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY date, transaction_id) AS cum_end,
        usd_total * 1.0 / molecules AS price_per_molecule
    FROM "transaction"
    WHERE sell = 0
),
sells AS (
    SELECT 
        molecule_id,
        date,
        molecules,
        usd_total,
        SUM(molecules) OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY date, transaction_id) - molecules AS cum_start,
        SUM(molecules) OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY date, transaction_id) AS cum_end,
        usd_total * 1.0 / molecules AS price_per_molecule
    FROM "transaction"
    WHERE sell = 1
),
matched AS (
    SELECT
        b.molecule_id,
        b.date AS buy_date,
        s.date AS sell_date,
        -- The overlap between [b.cum_start, b.cum_end) and [s.cum_start, s.cum_end)
        MIN(b.cum_end, s.cum_end) - MAX(b.cum_start, s.cum_start) AS allocated_molecules,
        b.price_per_molecule AS buy_price_per_molecule,
        s.price_per_molecule AS sell_price_per_molecule
    FROM buys b
    JOIN sells s
        ON b.molecule_id = s.molecule_id
        AND b.cum_start < s.cum_end
        AND s.cum_start < b.cum_end
)
SELECT
    molecule_id,
    buy_date,
    sell_date,
    allocated_molecules AS molecules,
    ROUND(allocated_molecules * buy_price_per_molecule, 2) AS buy_usd_total,
    ROUND(allocated_molecules * sell_price_per_molecule, 2) AS sell_usd_total
FROM matched
WHERE allocated_molecules > 0
ORDER BY molecule_id, buy_date, sell_date

WITH ordered AS (
    SELECT 
        prediction_code,
        Performance_Prediction,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY prediction_code ASC) AS rn
    FROM performance_predictions
),
RECURSIVE A(GroupNum, n, RollingSum, rn) AS (
    SELECT 
        1, 
        Performance_Prediction, 
        Performance_Prediction, 
        rn
    FROM ordered
    WHERE rn = 1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN A.RollingSum + O.Performance_Prediction > 200 THEN A.GroupNum + 1 
            ELSE A.GroupNum 
        END,
        O.Performance_Prediction,
        CASE 
            WHEN A.RollingSum + O.Performance_Prediction > 200 THEN O.Performance_Prediction 
            ELSE A.RollingSum + O.Performance_Prediction 
        END,
        O.rn
    FROM A
    JOIN ordered AS O ON A.rn + 1 = O.rn
)
SELECT 
    GroupNum AS group_number, 
    SUM(n) AS group_sum
FROM A
GROUP BY GroupNum
ORDER BY GroupNum

WITH attendance_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        link_to_member,
        link_to_event,
        COUNT(1) AS total
    FROM attendance
    GROUP BY link_to_member, link_to_event
),
top_events_per_member AS (
    SELECT 
        link_to_member,
        link_to_event,
        total,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY link_to_member ORDER BY total DESC) AS rn
    FROM attendance_counts
),
top_members_per_event AS (
    SELECT 
        link_to_member,
        link_to_event,
        total,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY link_to_event ORDER BY total DESC) AS rn
    FROM attendance_counts
)
SELECT 'top_events_per_member' AS result_type, link_to_member, link_to_event, total
FROM top_events_per_member
WHERE rn <= 2
UNION ALL
SELECT 'top_member_per_event' AS result_type, link_to_member, link_to_event, total
FROM top_members_per_event
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY result_type, link_to_member, total DESC

WITH RECURSIVE split(learner_code, engagement, rest) AS (
    SELECT 
        learner_code,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(engagement_history, ',') > 0 
            THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(engagement_history, 1, INSTR(engagement_history, ',') - 1))
            ELSE TRIM(engagement_history)
        END,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(engagement_history, ',') > 0 
            THEN SUBSTR(engagement_history, INSTR(engagement_history, ',') + 1)
            ELSE NULL
        END
    FROM learners_array
    WHERE engagement_history IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(engagement_history) != ''
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        learner_code,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(rest, ',') > 0 
            THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(rest, 1, INSTR(rest, ',') - 1))
            ELSE TRIM(rest)
        END,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(rest, ',') > 0 
            THEN SUBSTR(rest, INSTR(rest, ',') + 1)
            ELSE NULL
        END
    FROM split
    WHERE rest IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(rest) != ''
)
SELECT learner_code, CAST(engagement AS INTEGER) AS engagement
FROM split
WHERE engagement IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(engagement) != ''
ORDER BY learner_code, engagement

SELECT

    fk."to" as base_col, 
    m.name as referencing_table, 
    fk."from" as referencing_col, 
    'CONSTRAINT ' || m.name || '_' || fk."from" || '_fkey FOREIGN KEY (' || fk."from" || ') REFERENCES ' || fk."table" || '(' || fk."to" || ')' as constraint_sql 
FROM sqlite_master m, pragma_foreign_key_list(m.name) fk 
WHERE m.type = 'table' AND fk."table" = 'users'

WITH src AS (
    SELECT 1 as id, 0.0 as x1, 0.0 as y1, 0.0 as x2, 10.0 as y2
    UNION ALL SELECT 2, 0.0, 10.0, 0.0, 11.0
    UNION ALL SELECT 3, 1.0, 1.0, 0.0, 5.0
    UNION ALL SELECT 4, 1.0, 1.0, 2.0, 2.0
)
SELECT DISTINCT a.id
FROM src AS a
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM src AS b
    WHERE a.id <> b.id
      -- Denominator of the parametric intersection formula
      AND ((a.x2 - a.x1) * (b.y2 - b.y1) - (a.y2 - a.y1) * (b.x2 - b.x1)) <> 0
      -- Parameter t for segment a: intersection point along a is strictly interior (0 < t < 1)
      AND (
            ((b.x1 - a.x1) * (b.y2 - b.y1) - (b.y1 - a.y1) * (b.x2 - b.x1))
            * 1.0
            / ((a.x2 - a.x1) * (b.y2 - b.y1) - (a.y2 - a.y1) * (b.x2 - b.x1))
          ) > 0.0
      AND (
            ((b.x1 - a.x1) * (b.y2 - b.y1) - (b.y1 - a.y1) * (b.x2 - b.x1))
            * 1.0
            / ((a.x2 - a.x1) * (b.y2 - b.y1) - (a.y2 - a.y1) * (b.x2 - b.x1))
          ) < 1.0
      -- Parameter u for segment b: intersection point along b is strictly interior (0 < u < 1)
      AND (
            ((b.x1 - a.x1) * (a.y2 - a.y1) - (b.y1 - a.y1) * (a.x2 - a.x1))
            * 1.0
            / ((a.x2 - a.x1) * (b.y2 - b.y1) - (a.y2 - a.y1) * (b.x2 - b.x1))
          ) > 0.0
      AND (
            ((b.x1 - a.x1) * (a.y2 - a.y1) - (b.y1 - a.y1) * (a.x2 - a.x1))
            * 1.0
            / ((a.x2 - a.x1) * (b.y2 - b.y1) - (a.y2 - a.y1) * (b.x2 - b.x1))
          ) < 1.0
)
ORDER BY a.id

WITH RECURSIVE dates(d) AS (
    SELECT date('2023-01-01')
    UNION ALL
    SELECT date(d, '+1 day')
    FROM dates
    WHERE d < date('2023-01-10')
),
weekend_count AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) as weekends
    FROM dates
    WHERE strftime('%w', d) IN ('0', '6')
      AND d >= date('2023-01-01')
      AND d < date('2023-01-10')
),
time_calc AS (
    SELECT 
        julianday('2023-01-10 15:12:24') - julianday('2023-01-01 10:34:36') as total_days,
        weekends
    FROM weekend_count
),
adjusted AS (
    SELECT 
        total_days - weekends as work_days_decimal
    FROM time_calc
),
parts AS (
    SELECT
        CASE 
            WHEN work_days_decimal >= 0 THEN CAST(work_days_decimal AS INTEGER)
            ELSE CAST(work_days_decimal AS INTEGER) - 1
        END as full_days,
        (work_days_decimal - CASE 
            WHEN work_days_decimal >= 0 THEN CAST(work_days_decimal AS INTEGER)
            ELSE CAST(work_days_decimal AS INTEGER) - 1
        END) * 24.0 as remaining_hours_decimal
    FROM adjusted
),
parts2 AS (
    SELECT
        full_days,
        CAST(remaining_hours_decimal AS INTEGER) as full_hours,
        (remaining_hours_decimal - CAST(remaining_hours_decimal AS INTEGER)) * 60.0 as remaining_minutes_decimal
    FROM parts
),
parts3 AS (
    SELECT
        full_days,
        full_hours,
        CAST(remaining_minutes_decimal AS INTEGER) as full_minutes,
        CAST(ROUND((remaining_minutes_decimal - CAST(remaining_minutes_decimal AS INTEGER)) * 60.0) AS INTEGER) as full_seconds
    FROM parts2
)
SELECT 
    full_days || ' days ' || full_hours || ' hours ' || full_minutes || ' minutes ' || full_seconds || ' seconds' as time_diff
FROM parts3

WITH links AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE WHEN link.source_cluster > link.target_cluster THEN link.source_cluster ELSE link.target_cluster END AS big,
        CASE WHEN link.source_cluster > link.target_cluster THEN link.target_cluster ELSE link.source_cluster END AS smol,
        link.type AS type
    FROM link
)
SELECT 
    l.cluster AS left_id,
    l.cluster_type AS left_type,
    l.cluster_label AS left_label,
    r.cluster AS right_id,
    r.cluster_type AS right_type,
    r.cluster_label AS right_label,
    COUNT(DISTINCT l.article) AS articles,
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT links.type) AS link_types
FROM tag AS l
JOIN tag AS r ON l.article = r.article AND l.cluster > r.cluster
LEFT JOIN links ON l.cluster = links.big AND r.cluster = links.smol
GROUP BY l.cluster, l.cluster_label, l.cluster_type, r.cluster, r.cluster_label, r.cluster_type
ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT l.article) DESC

  AND i.country = 'CI'
  AND o.established = (
    SELECT MAX(o2.established)
    FROM ismember AS i2
    INNER JOIN organization AS o2 ON o2.abbreviation = i2.organization
    WHERE i2.type = 'member'
      AND i2.country = 'CI'
  )

WITH CTE AS (
    SELECT 
        inst."Institution_Type", 
        outcm."Pre_Test_Score", 
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY inst."Institution_Type" ORDER BY outcm."Pre_Test_Score" DESC) AS score_rank 
    FROM outcomes AS outcm 
    JOIN enrollment AS enrl ON outcm.learner_code = enrl.learner_code 
    JOIN institutions AS inst ON enrl.institution_key = inst.institution_key 
    WHERE inst."Institution_Type" IN ('Public', 'Private')
)
SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN "Institution_Type" = 'Public' AND score_rank = 1 THEN "Pre_Test_Score" END) -
    MAX(CASE WHEN "Institution_Type" = 'Private' AND score_rank = 1 THEN "Pre_Test_Score" END) AS score_diff
FROM CTE
SELECT REPLACE(REPLACE(Content_Type, UPPER(SUBSTR(Content_Type, 1, 1)), ''), LOWER(SUBSTR(Content_Type, 1, 1)), '') FROM educational_resources
SELECT REPLACE(REPLACE(primary_pathology_histological_type, 'Adenocarcinoma', 'Adenoma Carcinoma'), 'NOS', 'Not Otherwise Specified') AS transformed_histological_type FROM pathology_and_surgery

SELECT art, SUM(apop) AS total_apop
FROM (
    SELECT ac.art, a.apop, a.rdt,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ac.art ORDER BY a.rdt DESC) AS rn
    FROM sp_album_ctb ac
    JOIN sp_albums a ON ac.alb = a.zid
) ranked
WHERE rn <= 3
GROUP BY art

WITH redaction_check AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(primary_pathology_initial_pathologic_diagnosis_method, 
                           primary_pathology_init_pathology_dx_method_other) 
                  LIKE 'Other method, specify:' 
             THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS should_redact
    FROM pathology_and_surgery
)
SELECT
    CASE WHEN should_redact = 1 THEN NULL ELSE primary_pathology_neoplasm_histologic_grade END AS histologic_grade,
    CASE WHEN should_redact = 1 THEN NULL ELSE primary_pathology_days_to_initial_pathologic_diagnosis END AS days_to_initial_diagnosis,
    CASE WHEN should_redact = 1 THEN NULL ELSE primary_pathology_age_at_initial_pathologic_diagnosis END AS age_at_initial_diagnosis
FROM redaction_check

SELECT 
    t.trans_id,
    t.account_id,
    t.date,
    t.type,
    t.operation,
    t.amount,
    t.balance,
    t.k_symbol,
    t.bank,
    t.account,
    (
        SELECT t2.bank
        FROM trans t2
        WHERE t2.account_id = t.account_id
          AND t2.bank IS NOT NULL
          AND (t2.date > t.date OR (t2.date = t.date AND t2.trans_id > t.trans_id))
        ORDER BY t2.date, t2.trans_id
        LIMIT 1
    ) AS next_bank
FROM trans t
ORDER BY t.account_id, t.date, t.trans_id

WITH ordered AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        alb,
        art,
        feat_arts,
        start_date,
        end_date,
        LAG(end_date) OVER (
            PARTITION BY alb, art, feat_arts
            ORDER BY start_date
        ) AS prev_end_date
    FROM sp_album_ctb
),
grouped AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        alb,
        art,
        feat_arts,
        start_date,
        end_date,
        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN prev_end_date IS NOT NULL
                     AND DATE(prev_end_date, '+1 day') = start_date
                THEN 0
                ELSE 1
            END
        ) OVER (
            PARTITION BY alb, art, feat_arts
            ORDER BY start_date
            ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING
        ) AS grp
    FROM ordered
)
SELECT
    alb,
    art,
    feat_arts,
    MIN(start_date) AS start_date,
    CASE
        WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN end_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN NULL
        ELSE MAX(end_date)
    END AS end_date
FROM grouped
GROUP BY alb, art, feat_arts, grp
ORDER BY alb, art, feat_arts, start_date

    FROM learners AS l 
    INNER JOIN resource_usage AS r ON l.learner_code = r.learner_code 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT l.learner_code, l.gender, 0 AS resource_key, 'Synthetic Feedback' AS FeedbackType, 
        CASE WHEN o.Learner_Satisfaction_Score < 3 THEN 'Negative' ELSE 'Positive' END AS UserFeedback 
    FROM learners AS l 
    INNER JOIN outcomes AS o ON l.learner_code = o.learner_code
) AS combined
WHERE UserFeedback = 'Negative'

SELECT * FROM city ORDER BY CASE WHEN name GLOB '[A-Za-z]*' THEN name ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN INSTR(name, '-') > 0 THEN CAST(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, '-') + 1) AS INTEGER) ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN INSTR(name, '(') > 0 AND INSTR(name, ')') > 0 THEN CAST(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, '(') + 1, INSTR(name, ')') - INSTR(name, '(') - 1) AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END NULLS LAST

    tissue_source_site,
    COUNT(*) AS total_patients,
    SUM(CASE WHEN informed_consent_verified = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS consent_verified,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN informed_consent_verified = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS consent_verified_percentage
FROM patients

WITH sales AS (
    SELECT 
        "gasstationid" AS "GasstationId", 
        "customerid" AS "CustomerId", 
        "date" AS "SaleDate", 
        "amount" AS "Amount" 
    FROM "transactions_1k"
), 
initial_purchase AS (
    SELECT 
        "GasstationId", 
        "CustomerId", 
        MIN(DATE("SaleDate")) AS "FirstPurchaseDate" 
    FROM sales 
    GROUP BY "GasstationId", "CustomerId"
), 
customer_wages AS (
    SELECT 
        i."CustomerId", 
        s.* 
    FROM sales AS s 
    JOIN initial_purchase AS i 
        ON s."CustomerId" = i."CustomerId" 
        AND s."GasstationId" = i."GasstationId"
    WHERE s."SaleDate" >= i."FirstPurchaseDate" 
    ORDER BY i."CustomerId" DESC
) 
SELECT * FROM customer_wages

SELECT d.transaction_date, s.salesperson_name
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT transaction_date FROM sales_log) d
CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT salesperson_name FROM sales_log) s
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM sales_log sl
    WHERE sl.transaction_date = d.transaction_date
      AND sl.salesperson_name = s.salesperson_name
)
ORDER BY d.transaction_date, s.salesperson_name

WITH ranked_prices AS (
    SELECT

WITH RECURSIVE split(order_id, token, rest) AS (
    -- Initialize: for each order, start splitting delivery_zones by comma
    SELECT order_id,
           '',
           delivery_zones || ','
    FROM orders
    WHERE delivery_zones IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL

    -- Recursively extract each comma-separated token
    SELECT order_id,
           TRIM(SUBSTR(rest, 1, INSTR(rest, ',') - 1)),
           SUBSTR(rest, INSTR(rest, ',') + 1)
    FROM split
    WHERE rest != ''
)
SELECT DISTINCT o.*
FROM orders o
JOIN split s ON o.order_id = s.order_id
WHERE s.token != ''
  AND (
    -- Exact match (no range)
    (s.token NOT LIKE '%-%' AND s.token = '10015')
    OR
    -- Range match: target zip falls between the lower and upper bounds
    (s.token LIKE '%-%'
     AND CAST(SUBSTR(s.token, 1, INSTR(s.token, '-') - 1) AS INTEGER) <= 10015
     AND CAST(SUBSTR(s.token, INSTR(s.token, '-') + 1) AS INTEGER) >= 10015
    )
  )

WITH RECURSIVE ancestry AS (
    -- Base case: start with sets that have a parent
    SELECT 
        s.id,
        s.code,
        s.parentCode,
        s.code AS ancestralPath
    FROM sets s
    WHERE s.parentCode IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL

    -- Recursive case: follow the parentCode up the chain
    SELECT 
        a.id,
        a.code,
        p.parentCode,
        a.ancestralPath || '-' || p.code AS ancestralPath
    FROM ancestry a
    JOIN sets p ON a.parentCode = p.code
)
SELECT 
    id,
    code,
    ancestralPath AS ancestralCode
FROM ancestry
WHERE parentCode IS NULL

SELECT
  link_to_event,
  CASE
    WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'Closed'
    WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1
     AND MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'Open'
    WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'Open'
    WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'Planning'
    ELSE 'Unknown'
  END AS consolidated_status,
  CASE
    WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1
      THEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Closed' THEN remaining ELSE NULL END)
    WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1
     AND MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1
      THEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN spent ELSE NULL END)
         + MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN spent ELSE NULL END)
    WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1
      THEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN spent ELSE NULL END)
    WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1
      THEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN spent ELSE NULL END)
    ELSE NULL
  END AS financial_value
FROM budget
GROUP BY link_to_event

groups AS (

WITH RECURSIVE
depth_calc AS (
    SELECT entityid, parentid, emission, pctcontribution, 0 AS depth
    FROM tree_table
    WHERE parentid IS NULL OR parentid NOT IN (SELECT entityid FROM tree_table)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT t.entityid, t.parentid, t.emission, t.pctcontribution, dc.depth + 1
    FROM tree_table t JOIN depth_calc dc ON t.parentid = dc.entityid
),
max_depth AS (SELECT MAX(depth) AS md FROM depth_calc),
ranked AS (
    SELECT entityid, parentid, emission, pctcontribution, depth,
           CAST(emission AS REAL) AS cumulative_emission
    FROM depth_calc
    WHERE depth = (SELECT md FROM max_depth)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT d.entityid, d.parentid, d.emission, d.pctcontribution, d.depth,
           CAST(d.emission + COALESCE(
               (SELECT SUM(r.cumulative_emission * r.pctcontribution / 100.0)
                FROM ranked r WHERE r.parentid = d.entityid), 0
           ) AS REAL)
    FROM depth_calc d
    WHERE d.depth = (SELECT MIN(depth) - 1 FROM ranked)
)
SELECT entityid, parentid, ROUND(cumulative_emission, 2) AS total_emission
FROM ranked
ORDER BY entityid

WITH RECURSIVE date_range AS (
    SELECT '2010-01-01' AS dt
    UNION ALL
    SELECT date(dt, '+1 day')
    FROM date_range
    WHERE dt < '2014-12-31'
),
non_working_days AS (
    SELECT dt
    FROM date_range
    WHERE
        -- Weekends: strftime('%w') returns 0 for Sunday, 6 for Saturday
        strftime('%w', dt) IN ('0', '6')
        OR (
            -- Specific holidays: Jan 1, Jul 4, Nov 11, Dec 25
            (strftime('%m-%d', dt) = '01-01')
            OR (strftime('%m-%d', dt) = '07-04')
            OR (strftime('%m-%d', dt) = '11-11')
            OR (strftime('%m-%d', dt) = '12-25')
        )
)
SELECT

    COUNT(nwd.dt) AS NonWorkingDayCount
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN non_working_days nwd
    ON date(nwd.dt) >= date(u.CreationDate)
    AND date(nwd.dt) <= date(u.LastAccessDate)
WHERE

    AND u.LastAccessDate <= '2014-12-31'
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName, u.Age
ORDER BY u.Id

WITH all_times AS (
    SELECT start AS ts FROM duration
    UNION
    SELECT "end" AS ts FROM duration
),
ordered_times AS (
    SELECT
        ts AS interval_start,
        LEAD(ts) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS interval_end
    FROM all_times
)
SELECT
    ot.interval_start,
    ot.interval_end,
    COUNT(*) AS overlap_count
FROM ordered_times ot
JOIN duration d
    ON d.start < ot.interval_end
    AND d."end" > ot.interval_start
WHERE ot.interval_end IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ot.interval_start, ot.interval_end
ORDER BY ot.interval_start

WITH RECURSIVE atom_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT 
        c.atom_id, 
        c.atom_id2, 
        c.bond_id, 
        1 AS level, 
        ',' || c.atom_id || ',' || c.atom_id2 || ',' AS path
    FROM connected AS c
    WHERE c.atom_id = 'TR007_8'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        c.atom_id, 
        c.atom_id2, 
        c.bond_id, 
        ah.level + 1, 
        ah.path || c.atom_id2 || ','
    FROM connected AS c

        ON c.atom_id = ah.atom_id2
    WHERE INSTR(ah.path, ',' || c.atom_id2 || ',') = 0

    d.home_team,
    d.away_team,
    mr_h.score AS home_team_goal,
    mr_a.score AS away_team_goal,
    t.team_api_id,
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN t.team_long_name = d.home_team THEN mr_h.score - mr_a.score
            ELSE mr_a.score - mr_h.score
        END
    ) OVER (PARTITION BY t.team_api_id ORDER BY d.match_date, d.match_id) AS cumulative_goal_difference
FROM detail d
INNER JOIN (SELECT match_id, score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY match_id ORDER BY created_at) AS rn FROM match_results) mr_h
    ON d.match_id = mr_h.match_id AND mr_h.rn = 1
INNER JOIN (SELECT match_id, score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY match_id ORDER BY created_at) AS rn FROM match_results) mr_a
    ON d.match_id = mr_a.match_id AND mr_a.rn = 3

WITH type_years AS (
    SELECT
        type,
        MIN(CAST(strftime('%Y', event_date) AS INTEGER)) AS oldest_year,
        MAX(CAST(strftime('%Y', event_date) AS INTEGER)) AS recent_year
    FROM event
    WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL AND type IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY type
),
counts AS (
    SELECT
        e.type,
        ty.oldest_year,
        ty.recent_year,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN CAST(strftime('%Y', e.event_date) AS INTEGER) = ty.recent_year THEN 1 END) AS recent_count,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN CAST(strftime('%Y', e.event_date) AS INTEGER) = ty.oldest_year THEN 1 END) AS oldest_count
    FROM event e
    JOIN type_years ty ON e.type = ty.type
    GROUP BY e.type, ty.oldest_year, ty.recent_year
)
SELECT
    type AS event_type,
    recent_count - oldest_count AS year_difference
FROM counts

SELECT
  m.id,
  m.date,
  CAST(
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN m.day_of_week BETWEEN 1 AND 5 THEN
          CASE
            WHEN julianday(
              CASE
                WHEN julianday(m.match_end_time) < julianday(datetime(date(m.match_start_time) || ' 17:00:00'))
                THEN m.match_end_time
                ELSE datetime(date(m.match_start_time) || ' 17:00:00')
              END
            ) > julianday(
              CASE
                WHEN julianday(m.match_start_time) > julianday(datetime(date(m.match_start_time) || ' 07:30:00'))
                THEN m.match_start_time
                ELSE datetime(date(m.match_start_time) || ' 07:30:00')
              END
            )
            THEN
              (julianday(
                CASE
                  WHEN julianday(m.match_end_time) < julianday(datetime(date(m.match_start_time) || ' 17:00:00'))
                  THEN m.match_end_time
                  ELSE datetime(date(m.match_start_time) || ' 17:00:00')
                END
              ) - julianday(
                CASE
                  WHEN julianday(m.match_start_time) > julianday(datetime(date(m.match_start_time) || ' 07:30:00'))
                  THEN m.match_start_time
                  ELSE datetime(date(m.match_start_time) || ' 07:30:00')
                END
              )) * 1440
            ELSE 0
          END
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS INTEGER
  ) AS match_duration_minutes
FROM (
  SELECT
    id,
    date,
    CASE WHEN CAST(strftime('%w', date) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 7
         ELSE CAST(strftime('%w', date) AS INTEGER)
    END AS day_of_week,
    datetime(date) AS match_start_time,
    datetime(date, '+2 hours') AS match_end_time
  FROM Match
) AS m

),
input_data AS (
    SELECT 6 AS user_hours
)
SELECT

WITH home_matches AS (
    SELECT
        d.match_id,
        d.match_date,
        d.home_team,
        d.away_team,
        home_r.score AS home_score,
        away_r.score AS away_score,
        CASE WHEN home_r.score > away_r.score THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_home_win
    FROM detail d
    JOIN (
        SELECT match_id, team_id, score,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY match_id ORDER BY created_at) AS rn
        FROM match_results
    ) home_r ON d.match_id = home_r.match_id AND home_r.rn = 1
    JOIN (
        SELECT match_id, team_id, score,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY match_id ORDER BY created_at) AS rn
        FROM match_results
    ) away_r ON d.match_id = away_r.match_id AND away_r.rn = 2
),
ordered_matches AS (
    SELECT
        home_team,
        match_date,
        is_home_win,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY home_team ORDER BY match_date) AS overall_rn,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY home_team, is_home_win ORDER BY match_date) AS win_rn
    FROM home_matches
),
streaks AS (
    SELECT
        home_team,
        match_date,
        is_home_win,
        overall_rn - win_rn AS streak_group
    FROM ordered_matches
)
SELECT
    home_team AS team,
    MIN(match_date) AS start_date,
    MAX(match_date) AS end_date,
    COUNT(*) AS match_count
FROM streaks
WHERE is_home_win = 1
GROUP BY home_team, streak_group
ORDER BY home_team, start_date

WITH tbl AS (
    SELECT '2023-01-12' AS act_date, 1 AS item_id
    UNION ALL SELECT '2023-01-19', 2
    UNION ALL SELECT '2023-01-19', 3
    UNION ALL SELECT '2023-01-19', 4
    UNION ALL SELECT '2023-01-19', 5
    UNION ALL SELECT '2023-02-12', 6
    UNION ALL SELECT '2023-01-31', 7
    UNION ALL SELECT '2023-02-13', 8
    UNION ALL SELECT '2023-02-17', 9
    UNION ALL SELECT '2023-02-17', 10
    UNION ALL SELECT '2023-02-19', 11
    UNION ALL SELECT '2023-03-10', 12
    UNION ALL SELECT '2023-03-12', 13
    UNION ALL SELECT '2023-03-27', 14
    UNION ALL SELECT '2023-04-10', 15
),
months AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        STRFTIME('%Y-%m', act_date) AS month_key,
        STRFTIME('%m-%Y', act_date) AS month_label
    FROM tbl
),
grid AS (
    SELECT
        m1.month_label AS activation_month,
        m1.month_key AS rn_1,
        m2.month_label AS actual_month,
        m2.month_key AS rn_2
    FROM months m1
    JOIN months m2 ON m1.month_key <= m2.month_key
),
item_months AS (
    SELECT
        item_id,
        STRFTIME('%Y-%m', act_date) AS act_month_key
    FROM tbl
)
SELECT
    g.activation_month,
    g.actual_month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT im.item_id) AS active_items
FROM grid g
LEFT JOIN item_months im
    ON (
        CASE
            WHEN g.rn_1 = g.rn_2 THEN im.act_month_key = g.rn_1
            ELSE im.act_month_key >= g.rn_1 AND im.act_month_key <= g.rn_2
        END
    )
GROUP BY g.activation_month, g.actual_month, g.rn_1, g.rn_2
ORDER BY g.rn_1, g.rn_2

WITH source AS (
    SELECT DATE('2014-01-01') AS valid_from, DATE('2014-01-31') AS valid_until
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATE('2014-02-01') AS valid_from, DATE('2014-02-28') AS valid_until
),
events AS (
    SELECT valid_from AS dt, 1 AS delta FROM source
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATE(valid_until, '+1 day') AS dt, -1 AS delta FROM source
),
aggregated_events AS (
    SELECT dt, SUM(delta) AS net_delta
    FROM events
    GROUP BY dt
),
running AS (
    SELECT
        dt AS valid_from,
        LEAD(dt) OVER (ORDER BY dt) AS next_dt,
        SUM(net_delta) OVER (ORDER BY dt ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS count
    FROM aggregated_events
),
periods AS (
    SELECT
        valid_from,
        CASE WHEN next_dt IS NOT NULL THEN DATE(next_dt, '-1 day') ELSE NULL END AS valid_until,
        count
    FROM running
)
SELECT valid_from, valid_until, count
FROM periods
WHERE count > 0
  AND (valid_from <= valid_until OR valid_until IS NULL)

            CASE 
                WHEN INSTR(s.county, ' ') > 0 THEN INSTR(s.county, ' ') - 1 
                ELSE LENGTH(s.county) 
            END
        ) AS col3,
        datetime('2024-09-04 ' || printf('%02d:%02d:00', 
            (ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.cdscode)) % 24, 
            ((ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.cdscode)) * 7) % 60)
        ) AS col4
    FROM schools AS s
    WHERE s.statustype = 'Active'
        AND s.lastupdate IS NOT NULL
),
filtered_data AS (
    SELECT 
        sd.pk,
        sd.col2,
        sd.col3,
        sd.col4
    FROM school_data AS sd
    WHERE sd.col4 >= datetime('2024-09-04 00:00:00')
        AND sd.col4 < datetime('2024-09-04 00:05:00')

    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT col3) AS col3

GROUP BY col2

WITH RECURSIVE
string1_split(value, rest) AS (
    SELECT '', '24,36,78,98,' 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT SUBSTR(rest, 1, INSTR(rest, ',') - 1), 
           SUBSTR(rest, INSTR(rest, ',') + 1) 
    FROM string1_split 
    WHERE rest != ''
),
string1_values AS (
    SELECT TRIM(value) AS value FROM string1_split WHERE value != ''
),
string2_split(value, rest) AS (
    SELECT '', '25,36,88,98,' 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT SUBSTR(rest, 1, INSTR(rest, ',') - 1), 
           SUBSTR(rest, INSTR(rest, ',') + 1) 
    FROM string2_split 
    WHERE rest != ''

        CAST(julianday(date('now')) - julianday(date(match_date)) AS INTEGER) AS duration,
        COUNT(*) OVER (
            PARTITION BY date(match_date), match_id, 
            CAST(julianday(date('now')) - julianday(date(match_date)) AS INTEGER)
        ) AS cnt,
        MIN(CAST(julianday(date('now')) - julianday(date(match_date)) AS INTEGER)) OVER (
            PARTITION BY date(match_date), match_id
        ) AS min_dur
    FROM detail
)
SELECT 
    t."date",
    t.code,
    t.duration,
    CASE 
        WHEN t.min_dur = 0 
          OR MAX(t.cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY t."date", t.code) > 1 
        THEN 'Y' 
        ELSE 'N' 
    END AS flg
FROM t
WHERE datetime(t."date") = '2024-01-15 00:00:00'

WITH match_times AS (
    SELECT
        match_id,
        match_date,
        created_at,
        CAST(SUBSTR(created_at, 12, 2) AS REAL) + CAST(SUBSTR(created_at, 15, 2) AS REAL) / 60.0 AS hour_of_day,
        DATE(match_date) AS match_date_str
    FROM detail
),
target_times AS (
    SELECT 8 AS target_hour
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 20 AS target_hour
),
distance_calc AS (
    SELECT
        mt.match_id,
        mt.match_date_str,
        mt.created_at,
        tt.target_hour,
        CASE
            WHEN tt.target_hour = 8 THEN 'morning'
            WHEN tt.target_hour = 20 THEN 'evening'
        END AS time_period,
        ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour) AS time_distance,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY mt.match_date_str, tt.target_hour
            ORDER BY ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour)
        ) AS time_rank
    FROM match_times AS mt
    CROSS JOIN target_times AS tt
)
SELECT
    dc.match_date_str,
    dc.created_at,
    dc.match_id,
    dc.time_period,
    dc.time_distance
FROM distance_calc AS dc
WHERE dc.time_rank = 1
ORDER BY dc.match_date_str, dc.target_hour, dc.time_distance

SELECT
  REPLACE(
    SUBSTR(date, 1,
      CASE
        WHEN INSTR(date, '.') = 0 THEN LENGTH(date)
        WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, '.') + 1), '.') = 0
          THEN INSTR(date, '.') - 1
        WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, '.') + INSTR(SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, '.') + 1), '.') + 1), '.') = 0
          THEN INSTR(date, '.') + INSTR(SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, '.') + 1), '.') - 1
        ELSE
          INSTR(date, '.') + INSTR(SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, '.') + 1), '.') +
          INSTR(SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, '.') + INSTR(SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, '.') + 1), '.') + 1), '.') - 1
      END
    ), '.', ''
  ) ||
  SUBSTR(date,
    CASE
      WHEN INSTR(date, '.') = 0 THEN LENGTH(date) + 1
      WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, '.') + 1), '.') = 0
        THEN INSTR(date, '.')
      WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, '.') + INSTR(SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, '.') + 1), '.') + 1), '.') = 0
        THEN INSTR(date, '.') + INSTR(SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, '.') + 1), '.')
      ELSE
        INSTR(date, '.') + INSTR(SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, '.') + 1), '.') +
        INSTR(SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, '.') + INSTR(SUBSTR(date, INSTR(date, '.') + 1), '.') + 1), '.')
    END
  ) AS updated_value
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE date IS NOT NULL

WITH my_table AS (
    SELECT 'A' AS cto, 1 AS nif, 'A1' AS file_, 5 AS filesize
    UNION ALL SELECT 'A', 1, 'A2', 3
    UNION ALL SELECT 'A', 2, 'A3', 2
    UNION ALL SELECT 'A', 2, 'A4', 1
    UNION ALL SELECT 'B', 1, 'B1', 4
    UNION ALL SELECT 'B', 1, 'B2', 6
),
-- Assign row numbers within each (cto) ordered by file_
ordered AS (
    SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cto ORDER BY file_) AS rn
    FROM my_table
),
-- Calculate total filesize per (cto, nif) group
nif_groups AS (
    SELECT cto, nif, SUM(filesize) AS group_size, MIN(file_) AS min_file
    FROM my_table
    GROUP BY cto, nif
),
-- Order nif groups within each cto and compute running totals
nif_ordered AS (
    SELECT *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cto ORDER BY min_file) AS grp_order
    FROM nif_groups
),
-- Recursively assign partitions based on cumulative size <= 10
partitioned_groups AS (
    SELECT cto, nif, group_size, min_file, grp_order,
           1 AS partition_num,
           group_size AS running_size
    FROM nif_ordered
    WHERE grp_order = 1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT n.cto, n.nif, n.group_size, n.min_file, n.grp_order,
           CASE
               WHEN p.running_size + n.group_size > 10 THEN p.partition_num + 1
               ELSE p.partition_num
           END,
           CASE
               WHEN p.running_size + n.group_size > 10 THEN n.group_size
               ELSE p.running_size + n.group_size
           END
    FROM nif_ordered n
    JOIN partitioned_groups p
      ON n.cto = p.cto AND n.grp_order = p.grp_order + 1
),
-- Join back to original rows and assign subpartition numbers within each partition
final AS (
    SELECT o.cto, o.nif, o.file_, o.filesize,
           pg.partition_num,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.cto, pg.partition_num ORDER BY o.file_) AS subpartition
    FROM ordered o
    JOIN partitioned_groups pg ON o.cto = pg.cto AND o.nif = pg.nif
)
SELECT
    f.cto,
    f.nif,
    f.file_,
    f.partition_num AS partition,
    f.subpartition,
    SUM(f.filesize) OVER (PARTITION BY f.cto, f.partition_num) AS total_size
FROM final f
ORDER BY f.cto, f.file_

WITH "a"("test") AS (
    VALUES 
        ('Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16|DY7009|Address at some where|details'),
        ('Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16|DY7009|'),
        ('Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16')
),
"positions" AS (
    SELECT 
        "test",
        -- Find position of each pipe sequentially
        INSTR("test", '|') AS p1,
        CASE WHEN INSTR("test", '|') > 0 
             THEN INSTR("test", '|') + INSTR(SUBSTR("test", INSTR("test", '|') + 1), '|') 
             ELSE 0 END AS p2,
        CASE WHEN INSTR("test", '|') > 0 
              AND INSTR(SUBSTR("test", INSTR("test", '|') + 1), '|') > 0
             THEN INSTR("test", '|') + INSTR(SUBSTR("test", INSTR("test", '|') + 1), '|')
                  + INSTR(SUBSTR("test", INSTR("test", '|') + INSTR(SUBSTR("test", INSTR("test", '|') + 1), '|') + 1), '|')
             ELSE 0 END AS p3
    FROM "a"
),
"pos4" AS (
    SELECT 
        "test", p1, p2, p3,
        CASE WHEN p3 > 0 
             THEN p3 + INSTR(SUBSTR("test", p3 + 1), '|') 
             ELSE 0 END AS p4
    FROM "positions"
),
"pos5" AS (
    SELECT 
        "test", p1, p2, p3, p4,
        CASE WHEN p4 > 0 
             THEN p4 + INSTR(SUBSTR("test", p4 + 1), '|') 
             ELSE 0 END AS p5
    FROM "pos4"
)
SELECT 
    "test",
    CASE 
        WHEN p5 > p4 AND p4 > 0 THEN SUBSTR("test", 1, p5 - 1)
        ELSE "test"
    END AS "res"
FROM "pos5"

SELECT
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY T.Date, T.Time, T.TransactionID) AS Row,
  CASE
    WHEN LEAD(T.Date) OVER (ORDER BY T.Date, T.Time, T.TransactionID) IS NOT NULL
    THEN CAST(
      (JULIANDAY(LEAD(T.Date || ' ' || T.Time) OVER (ORDER BY T.Date, T.Time, T.TransactionID))
       - JULIANDAY(T.Date || ' ' || T.Time)) * 86400
      AS INTEGER)
    ELSE NULL

WITH ranked AS (

           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(printings) DESC) AS rn
    FROM cards
    GROUP BY name

top3 AS (
    SELECT name, Prints FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 3
),
others AS (

SELECT

  GROUP_CONCAT(driverId) OVER (ORDER BY points ASC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS "group_concat(driverId) with order",

SELECT

    res.points

INNER JOIN races AS r ON res.raceId = r.raceId

SELECT

    a2.atom_id AS atom_id2,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type
FROM atom AS a1
JOIN atom AS a2
    ON a1.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
    AND a1.atom_id < a2.atom_id
LEFT JOIN connected AS c
    ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
    AND c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond AS b
    ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
ORDER BY a1.atom_id, a2.atom_id

SELECT 
    ID,

    GOT,
    MAX(GOT) OVER (
        PARTITION BY ID, grp
    ) AS NEW_GOT
FROM (
    SELECT 
        ID, 
        Date, 
        GOT,
        COUNT(GOT) OVER (
            PARTITION BY ID 
            ORDER BY Date 
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS grp
    FROM Laboratory
)
ORDER BY ID, Date

WITH data AS (

        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY County ORDER BY CDSCode ASC) AS rnk
    FROM schools
)
SELECT 
    a.CDSCode AS cdscode1, 
    a.County AS county1, 
    b.CDSCode AS cdscode2, 
    b.County AS county2
FROM data AS a
INNER JOIN data AS b 
    ON a.County = b.County 
    AND b.rnk = a.rnk + 1
WHERE a.rnk % 2 = 1
ORDER BY a.County, a.rnk

SELECT

    a1.element AS atom1_element,
    a2.atom_id AS atom2_id,

    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type
FROM connected AS c
INNER JOIN atom AS a1 ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
INNER JOIN atom AS a2 ON a2.atom_id = c.atom_id2
INNER JOIN bond AS b ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
WHERE a1.atom_id < a2.atom_id
ORDER BY a1.molecule_id, a1.atom_id, a2.atom_id

SELECT

    r.year,
    r.name AS raceName,
    MAX(CASE WHEN res.positionText = '1' THEN d.forename || ' ' || d.surname END) AS position1_driver,
    MAX(CASE WHEN res.positionText = '1' THEN res.driverId END) AS position1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN res.positionText = '2' THEN d.forename || ' ' || d.surname END) AS position2_driver,
    MAX(CASE WHEN res.positionText = '2' THEN res.driverId END) AS position2,
    MAX(CASE WHEN res.positionText = '3' THEN d.forename || ' ' || d.surname END) AS position3_driver,
    MAX(CASE WHEN res.positionText = '3' THEN res.driverId END) AS position3

WITH x AS (
    SELECT 
        r.driverId, 
        s.status, 
        COUNT(*) AS cnt,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.driverId ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn 
    FROM results r
    JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
    GROUP BY r.driverId, r.statusId
)

WITH DriverGroups AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE WHEN nationality IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' ELSE nationality END AS driver_group,
        code
    FROM drivers
    WHERE code IS NOT NULL
),
GroupedCodes AS (
    SELECT 
        driver_group,
        MIN(code) AS min_code,
        MAX(code) AS max_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT code) AS distinct_code_count
    FROM DriverGroups
    GROUP BY driver_group
)
SELECT 
    driver_group,
    CASE 
        WHEN distinct_code_count > 1 THEN CAST(min_code AS TEXT) || '-' || CAST(max_code AS TEXT)
        ELSE CAST(max_code AS TEXT)
    END AS concat_codes
FROM GroupedCodes
ORDER BY driver_group

WITH DriverCodes AS (
    SELECT
        driverId,
        forename,
        surname,
        MIN(code) AS min_code,
        MAX(code) AS max_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT code) AS distinct_code_count
    FROM drivers
    WHERE code IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY driverId, forename, surname
)
SELECT
    driverId,
    forename,
    surname,
    CASE
        WHEN distinct_code_count > 1 THEN min_code || '-' || max_code
        ELSE min_code
    END AS concat_codes
FROM DriverCodes
ORDER BY surname, forename

WITH TeamAverages AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(CAST(buildUpPlaySpeed AS REAL)) AS AvgBuildUpPlaySpeed, 
        AVG(CAST(defenceTeamWidth AS REAL)) AS AvgDefenceTeamWidth 
    FROM Team_Attributes 
    WHERE buildUpPlaySpeed IS NOT NULL AND defenceTeamWidth IS NOT NULL
) 
SELECT 
    TA.id, 
    TA.buildUpPlaySpeed, 
    TA.buildUpPlayPassing, 
    TA.chanceCreationPassing, 
    TA.chanceCreationCrossing, 
    TA.chanceCreationShooting, 
    TA.defencePressure, 
    TA.defenceAggression, 
    TA.defenceTeamWidth 
FROM Team_Attributes AS TA, TeamAverages
WHERE TA.buildUpPlaySpeed > TeamAverages.AvgBuildUpPlaySpeed 
  AND TA.defenceTeamWidth < TeamAverages.AvgDefenceTeamWidth 
ORDER BY TA.buildUpPlaySpeed DESC, TA.defenceTeamWidth ASC

WITH TeamRecords AS (
    SELECT
        TA.*,
        LEAD(buildUpPlaySpeed) OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS next_buildUpPlaySpeed,
        LEAD(buildUpPlayPassing) OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS next_buildUpPlayPassing,
        LAG(defenceTeamWidth) OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS prev_defenceTeamWidth,
        LAG(chanceCreationShooting) OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS prev_chanceCreationShooting,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id) AS team_record_count
    FROM Team_Attributes AS TA
)
SELECT
    id,
    team_api_id,
    date,
    buildUpPlaySpeed,
    buildUpPlayPassing,
    next_buildUpPlaySpeed,
    next_buildUpPlayPassing,
    defenceTeamWidth,
    chanceCreationShooting,
    prev_defenceTeamWidth,
    prev_chanceCreationShooting
FROM TeamRecords
WHERE team_record_count > 1
  AND prev_defenceTeamWidth > buildUpPlaySpeed
ORDER BY team_api_id, date

SELECT 
    m.label,
    JSON_GROUP_ARRAY(
        JSON_OBJECT(
            'molecule_id', m.molecule_id,
            'atoms', m.atoms,
            'bonds', m.bonds
        )
    ) AS groupedMolecules
FROM (
    SELECT 
        mol.molecule_id,
        mol.label,
        JSON_GROUP_ARRAY(DISTINCT a.atom_id) AS atoms,
        COALESCE(
            (SELECT JSON_GROUP_ARRAY(
                JSON_OBJECT('bond_id', b.bond_id, 'bond_type', b.bond_type)
            )
            FROM bond b
            WHERE b.molecule_id = mol.molecule_id),
            JSON_ARRAY()
        ) AS bonds
    FROM molecule mol
    LEFT JOIN atom a ON mol.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    GROUP BY mol.molecule_id, mol.label
) m
GROUP BY m.label

WITH TEAMATTRS AS (
    SELECT 
        BUILDUPPLAYSPEED AS VALUE, 
        'Team_Attributes' AS IDENTIFIER, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY BUILDUPPLAYSPEED) AS RN 
    FROM Team_Attributes
),
PLAYERATTRS AS (
    SELECT 
        OVERALL_RATING AS VALUE, 
        'Player_Attributes' AS IDENTIFIER, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY OVERALL_RATING) AS RN 
    FROM Player_Attributes
)
SELECT 
    PLAYERATTRS.VALUE AS PLAYER_RATING, 
    PLAYERATTRS.IDENTIFIER AS PLAYER_IDENTIFIER,

WITH CardLegalities AS (
    SELECT c.name AS card_name, l.format, l.status, l.id
    FROM cards AS c
    INNER JOIN legalities AS l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
    WHERE l.format IN ('commander', 'duel', 'legacy')
),
LegalityStats AS (
    SELECT card_name, format,
        MAX(CASE WHEN status = 'Legal' THEN id END) AS legal_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN status = 'Banned' THEN id END) AS banned_id
    FROM CardLegalities
    GROUP BY card_name, format
)
SELECT ls.card_name, ls.format, ls.legal_id, ls.banned_id,
    (COALESCE(ls.legal_id, 0) - COALESCE(ls.banned_id, 0)) AS id_diff
FROM LegalityStats AS ls
WHERE ls.legal_id IS NOT NULL OR ls.banned_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ls.card_name ASC, ls.format ASC

WITH a AS (SELECT id, date AS applicationid, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY date NULLS FIRST) AS rn, LAG(date) OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY date NULLS FIRST) AS prev FROM laboratory) SELECT id AS usercode, prev AS data_1, rn - 1 AS id_1, applicationid AS data_2, rn AS id_2 FROM a WHERE prev IS NOT NULL

WITH pages AS (SELECT 1 AS page_id, 1 AS power_id UNION ALL SELECT 1, 7 UNION ALL SELECT 2, 1 UNION ALL SELECT 3, 1 UNION ALL SELECT 3, 7 UNION ALL SELECT 3, 89 UNION ALL SELECT 4, 20 UNION ALL SELECT 5, 55 UNION ALL SELECT 5, 1 UNION ALL SELECT 6, 1 UNION ALL SELECT 6, 13), items AS (SELECT 10 AS hero_id, 1 AS power_id UNION ALL SELECT 10, 7 UNION ALL SELECT 10, 20 UNION ALL SELECT 12, 1 UNION ALL SELECT 12, 55) SELECT p.page_id, i.hero_id FROM (SELECT p.page_id, p.power_id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY p.page_id) AS total_powers FROM pages AS p) AS p INNER JOIN items AS i ON p.power_id = i.power_id GROUP BY p.page_id, i.hero_id, p.total_powers HAVING COUNT(i.power_id) >= p.total_powers

SELECT molecule_id,

       CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN element IN ('c', 'cl') THEN element END) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS c_atoms

WITH diagnosis_history AS (
    SELECT
        e.ID,
        e."Examination Date" AS as_of_date,
        e.Diagnosis AS current_diagnosis,
        LAG(e.Diagnosis) OVER (PARTITION BY e.ID ORDER BY e."Examination Date") AS prev_diagnosis
    FROM Examination AS e
),
filtered AS (
    SELECT
        ID,
        as_of_date,
        current_diagnosis,
        prev_diagnosis
    FROM diagnosis_history
    WHERE current_diagnosis IN ('RA susp.', 'PSS', 'SLE')
      AND (prev_diagnosis IS NULL OR current_diagnosis <> prev_diagnosis)
)
SELECT
    id,
    MIN(as_of_date) AS desired_output,
    current_diagnosis
FROM filtered
GROUP BY id, current_diagnosis
ORDER BY id

WITH ATOMRNS AS (

SELECT

    MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 1 THEN ELEMENT END) AS ELEMENT1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN RN = 2 THEN ELEMENT END) AS ELEMENT2,

FROM ATOMRNS
WHERE RN <= 3
GROUP BY MOLECULE_ID

WITH SchemaInfo AS (
    SELECT name AS column_name, type AS data_type
    FROM pragma_table_info('schools')
),
SATData AS (
    SELECT cds, rtype,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY cds ORDER BY NumTstTakr DESC) AS RowRank
    FROM satscores
    WHERE NumTstTakr > 0
)
SELECT
    '<Results>'
    || COALESCE(
        (SELECT '<Columns>'
            || GROUP_CONCAT(
                '<Column Name="' || column_name || '">'
                || '<DataType>' || COALESCE(data_type, '') || '</DataType>'
                || '</Column>',
                ''
            )
            || '</Columns>'
        FROM SchemaInfo),
        '<Columns/>')
    || COALESCE(
        (SELECT '<Rows>'
            || GROUP_CONCAT(
                '<Row>'
                || '<cds>' || COALESCE(cds, '') || '</cds>'
                || '<rtype>' || COALESCE(rtype, '') || '</rtype>'
                || '</Row>',
                ''
            )
            || '</Rows>'
        FROM SATData
        WHERE RowRank = 1),
        '<Rows/>')
    || '</Results>' AS EntireXmlAsText

WITH all_numbered AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Date,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CustomerID ORDER BY Date) AS rn_all
    FROM yearmonth
),
zero_numbered AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Date,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CustomerID ORDER BY Date) AS rn_zero
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE Consumption = 0
),
islands AS (
    SELECT z.CustomerID, z.Date,
           z.rn_zero - a.rn_all AS grp
    FROM zero_numbered z
    JOIN all_numbered a ON z.CustomerID = a.CustomerID AND z.Date = a.Date
)
SELECT CustomerID,
       MIN(Date) AS StartMonth,
       MAX(Date) AS EndMonth

SELECT 
    name,
    -- Word 1: everything before the first space
    CASE 
        WHEN INSTR(name, ' ') > 0 THEN SUBSTR(name, 1, INSTR(name, ' ') - 1)
        ELSE name
    END AS name1,
    -- Word 2: between first and second space
    CASE 
        WHEN INSTR(name, ' ') = 0 THEN NULL
        WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), ' ') > 0 
            THEN SUBSTR(
                SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), 
                1, 
                INSTR(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), ' ') - 1
            )
        ELSE SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1)
    END AS name2,
    -- Word 3: between second and third space
    CASE 
        WHEN INSTR(name, ' ') = 0 THEN NULL
        WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), ' ') = 0 THEN NULL
        WHEN INSTR(
                SUBSTR(
                    SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), 
                    INSTR(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), ' ') + 1
                ), ' '
             ) > 0 
            THEN SUBSTR(
                SUBSTR(
                    SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), 
                    INSTR(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), ' ') + 1
                ),
                1,
                INSTR(
                    SUBSTR(
                        SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), 
                        INSTR(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), ' ') + 1
                    ), ' '
                ) - 1
            )
        ELSE SUBSTR(
                SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), 
                INSTR(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), ' ') + 1
             )
    END AS name3,
    -- Word 4: after the third space
    CASE 
        WHEN INSTR(name, ' ') = 0 THEN NULL
        WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), ' ') = 0 THEN NULL
        WHEN INSTR(
                SUBSTR(
                    SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), 
                    INSTR(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), ' ') + 1
                ), ' '
             ) = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE SUBSTR(
                SUBSTR(
                    SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), 
                    INSTR(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), ' ') + 1
                ),
                INSTR(
                    SUBSTR(
                        SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), 
                        INSTR(SUBSTR(name, INSTR(name, ' ') + 1), ' ') + 1
                    ), ' '
                ) + 1
             )
    END AS name4
FROM races

    END,

WITH RECURSIVE
-- Merge overlapping blackout periods
blackout_sorted AS (
    SELECT start_date, end_date,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY start_date, end_date) AS rn
    FROM blackout_periods
),
merged_blackouts AS (
    SELECT start_date, end_date, rn
    FROM blackout_sorted
    WHERE rn = 1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN bs.start_date <= mb.end_date THEN mb.start_date ELSE bs.start_date END,
        CASE WHEN bs.start_date <= mb.end_date THEN MAX(mb.end_date, bs.end_date) ELSE bs.end_date END,
        bs.rn
    FROM merged_blackouts mb
    JOIN blackout_sorted bs ON bs.rn = mb.rn + 1
),
final_blackouts AS (
    SELECT start_date, MAX(end_date) AS end_date
    FROM merged_blackouts
    GROUP BY start_date
),
-- Collect all boundary points
boundaries AS (
    SELECT t FROM (
        SELECT start_date AS t FROM account_activity
        UNION
        SELECT end_date AS t FROM account_activity
        UNION
        SELECT start_date AS t FROM final_blackouts
        UNION
        SELECT end_date AS t FROM final_blackouts
    )
),
-- Create intervals between consecutive boundary points
intervals AS (
    SELECT t AS s, LEAD(t) OVER (ORDER BY t) AS e
    FROM boundaries
)
SELECT s, e
FROM intervals
WHERE e IS NOT NULL
  AND s <> e
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM account_activity
      WHERE s >= start_date AND e <= end_date
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM final_blackouts
      WHERE s >= start_date AND e <= end_date
  )
ORDER BY s
