WITH ordered_contracts AS (
    SELECT
        DriverId,
        ContractType,
        StartDate,
        EndDate,
        LAG(EndDate) OVER (
            PARTITION BY DriverId, ContractType
            ORDER BY StartDate, EndDate
        ) AS prev_end_date
    FROM driverContracts
),
grouped_contracts AS (
    SELECT
        DriverId,
        ContractType,
        StartDate,
        EndDate,
        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN prev_end_date IS NULL THEN 1
                WHEN StartDate > DATE(prev_end_date, '+1 day') THEN 1
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) OVER (
            PARTITION BY DriverId, ContractType
            ORDER BY StartDate, EndDate
            ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING
        ) AS grp
    FROM ordered_contracts
),
merged AS (
    SELECT
        DriverId,
        ContractType,
        MIN(StartDate) AS StartDate,
        MAX(EndDate) AS EndDate
    FROM grouped_contracts
    GROUP BY DriverId, ContractType, grp
)
SELECT
    DriverId,
    ContractType,
    StartDate,
    EndDate
FROM merged
ORDER BY DriverId, ContractType, StartDate

WITH RECURSIVE CTE_RN AS (
    SELECT e.exp_id, e.mid, e.qty, i.qty AS LimitQty,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY e.exp_id) AS rn
    FROM Experiment AS e
    INNER JOIN Inventory AS i ON e.mid = i.mid
    WHERE e.mid = 2
),
CTE_Recursive AS (
    SELECT r.exp_id, r.mid, r.qty, r.LimitQty, r.rn,
           CASE WHEN r.qty <= r.LimitQty THEN r.qty ELSE 0 END AS CumulativeConsumed,
           CASE WHEN r.qty <= r.LimitQty THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Executable
    FROM CTE_RN AS r
    WHERE r.rn = 1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT r.exp_id, r.mid, r.qty, r.LimitQty, r.rn,
           CASE WHEN r.qty <= (r.LimitQty - rec.CumulativeConsumed) 
                THEN rec.CumulativeConsumed + r.qty 
                ELSE rec.CumulativeConsumed 
           END AS CumulativeConsumed,
           CASE WHEN r.qty <= (r.LimitQty - rec.CumulativeConsumed) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Executable
    FROM CTE_RN AS r
    INNER JOIN CTE_Recursive AS rec ON rec.rn + 1 = r.rn
)
SELECT exp_id, mid, Executable
FROM CTE_Recursive
ORDER BY rn

UPDATE trans
SET
  operation = COALESCE(operation, (
    SELECT t2.operation
    FROM trans t2
    WHERE t2.account_id = trans.account_id
      AND t2.date < trans.date
      AND t2.operation IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY t2.date DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )),
  k_symbol = COALESCE(k_symbol, (
    SELECT t2.k_symbol
    FROM trans t2
    WHERE t2.account_id = trans.account_id
      AND t2.date < trans.date
      AND t2.k_symbol IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY t2.date DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )),
  bank = COALESCE(bank, (
    SELECT t2.bank
    FROM trans t2
    WHERE t2.account_id = trans.account_id
      AND t2.date < trans.date
      AND t2.bank IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY t2.date DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )),
  account = COALESCE(account, (
    SELECT t2.account
    FROM trans t2
    WHERE t2.account_id = trans.account_id
      AND t2.date < trans.date
      AND t2.account IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY t2.date DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ))
WHERE operation IS NULL
   OR k_symbol IS NULL
   OR bank IS NULL
   OR account IS NULL

WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        m.id,
        m.date,
        m.home_team_goal,
        m.away_team_goal,
        CASE WHEN m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS invoiced,

),
agg AS (
    SELECT 
        grp,
        SUM(CASE WHEN invoiced = 0 THEN total_goals ELSE 0 END) AS accumulated_amount
    FROM base
    GROUP BY grp
)
SELECT 
    b.id,
    b.date,
    b.invoiced,
    a.accumulated_amount AS amount
FROM base b

WHERE b.invoiced = 1
ORDER BY b.id, b.date

WITH LastPerStation AS (
    -- Get the last transaction at each gas station per customer
    SELECT *,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
               PARTITION BY customerid, gasstationid 
               ORDER BY StartDate DESC, transaction_time DESC
           ) AS rn_station
    FROM transactions_1k
),
FilteredLast AS (
    -- Only keep the last transaction per gas station per customer
    SELECT * FROM LastPerStation WHERE rn_station = 1
),
Ranked AS (
    SELECT *,
           -- Find the first (chronologically) gas station with amount < 10
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
               PARTITION BY customerid 
               ORDER BY StartDate ASC, transaction_time ASC
           ) AS rn_issue,
           -- Find the last (chronologically) gas station with amount >= 10
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
               PARTITION BY customerid 
               ORDER BY StartDate DESC, transaction_time DESC
           ) AS rn_last_ok,
           -- Check if this customer has any issue transactions
           SUM(CASE WHEN amount < 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY customerid) AS has_issue
    FROM FilteredLast
),
FirstIssue AS (
    -- First station with amount < 10 per customer
    SELECT customerid, transactionid, gasstationid, amount
    FROM Ranked
    WHERE amount < 10 AND rn_issue = 1 AND has_issue > 0
),
LastOk AS (
    -- Last station with amount >= 10 per customer (only if no issues exist)
    SELECT customerid, transactionid, gasstationid, amount
    FROM Ranked
    WHERE amount >= 10 AND rn_last_ok = 1 AND has_issue = 0
)
SELECT * FROM FirstIssue
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM LastOk

WITH search_sessions AS (
    SELECT 
        s.user_id,
        s.action_time AS search_time,
        (SELECT MAX(l.action_time) 
         FROM user_actions l 
         WHERE l.user_id = s.user_id 
           AND l.action = 'LOGIN' 
           AND l.action_time <= s.action_time
        ) AS prev_login_time,
        (SELECT MIN(l.action_time) 
         FROM user_actions l 
         WHERE l.user_id = s.user_id 
           AND l.action = 'LOGIN' 
           AND l.action_time > s.action_time
        ) AS next_login_time
    FROM user_actions s
    WHERE s.action = 'SEARCH'
)
SELECT 
    ss.user_id,
    COUNT(*) AS abandoned_search_count
FROM search_sessions ss
WHERE ss.prev_login_time IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 
      FROM user_actions b
      WHERE b.user_id = ss.user_id
        AND b.action = 'BUY'
        AND b.action_time > ss.prev_login_time
        AND (b.action_time < ss.next_login_time OR ss.next_login_time IS NULL)
  )
GROUP BY ss.user_id

WITH RECURSIVE user_edges AS (
    SELECT u1.username AS u1, u2.username AS u2
    FROM users u1
    JOIN users u2 ON u1.username != u2.username
        AND (u1.ref1 = u2.ref1 OR u1.ref1 = u2.ref2 OR u1.ref2 = u2.ref1 OR u1.ref2 = u2.ref2)
),
connected AS (
    SELECT username AS member, username AS root FROM users
    UNION
    SELECT e.u2, c.root
    FROM connected c
    JOIN user_edges e ON e.u1 = c.member
    WHERE e.u2 != c.root
),
groups AS (
    SELECT member, MIN(root) AS group_id
    FROM connected
    GROUP BY member
),
group_refs AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT g.group_id, u.ref1 AS ref FROM groups g JOIN users u ON u.username = g.member
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT g.group_id, u.ref2 AS ref FROM groups g JOIN users u ON u.username = g.member
),
matched_assets AS (
    SELECT gr.group_id,
           GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT g.member) AS usernames,
           COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS asset_count,
           GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT a.name) AS asset_ids
    FROM group_refs gr
    JOIN groups g ON g.group_id = gr.group_id
    LEFT JOIN assets a ON a.owner = gr.ref
    GROUP BY gr.group_id
),
unmatched_assets AS (
    SELECT a.owner AS group_id,
           NULL AS usernames,
           COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS asset_count,
           GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT a.name) AS asset_ids
    FROM assets a
    WHERE a.owner NOT IN (SELECT ref FROM group_refs)
    GROUP BY a.owner
)
SELECT group_id, usernames, asset_count, asset_ids FROM matched_assets
UNION ALL
SELECT group_id, usernames, asset_count, asset_ids FROM unmatched_assets

WITH qr1 AS (
    SELECT id, subgroup1 AS subgroup 
    FROM superhero_group 
    WHERE subgroup1 IS NOT NULL
),
qr2 AS (
    SELECT id, subgroup2 AS subgroup 
    FROM superhero_group 
    WHERE subgroup2 IS NOT NULL
),
combined AS (
    SELECT id, subgroup FROM qr1
    UNION
    SELECT id, subgroup FROM qr2
),
-- Find direct connections between subgroups that share at least one item
subgroup_connections AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c1.subgroup AS sg1, c2.subgroup AS sg2
    FROM combined c1
    JOIN combined c2 ON c1.id = c2.id
    WHERE c1.subgroup <> c2.subgroup
),
-- Assign initial representative as the minimum connected subgroup
-- Use recursive CTE to propagate transitive closure
roots AS (
    SELECT subgroup, subgroup AS root
    FROM combined
    UNION
    SELECT sc.sg1, sc.sg2
    FROM subgroup_connections sc
),
all_subgroups AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT subgroup FROM combined
),
-- Recursive transitive closure to find the minimum reachable subgroup for each subgroup
reachable(subgroup, root) AS (
    SELECT subgroup, subgroup AS root
    FROM all_subgroups
    UNION
    SELECT r.subgroup, sc.sg2
    FROM reachable r
    JOIN subgroup_connections sc ON r.root = sc.sg1
    WHERE sc.sg2 < r.root
    UNION
    SELECT r.subgroup, sc.sg1
    FROM reachable r
    JOIN subgroup_connections sc ON r.root = sc.sg2
    WHERE sc.sg1 < r.root
),
subgroup_to_group AS (
    SELECT subgroup, MIN(root) AS group_id
    FROM reachable
    GROUP BY subgroup
),
item_groups AS (
    SELECT c.id, MIN(sg.group_id) AS group_id
    FROM combined c
    JOIN subgroup_to_group sg ON c.subgroup = sg.subgroup
    GROUP BY c.id
)
SELECT id, group_id
FROM item_groups
ORDER BY group_id, id

WITH RECURSIVE extract_tokens AS (
    -- Base case: start with the original text for each card
    SELECT 
        id,
        text AS original_text,
        text AS remaining_text,
        '' AS token,
        0 AS token_count
    FROM cards
    WHERE text LIKE '%{%}%'

    UNION ALL

    -- Recursive step: extract the next {…} token
    SELECT 
        id,
        original_text,
        -- Remaining text after the current token's closing }
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(remaining_text, '{') > 0 
                 AND INSTR(SUBSTR(remaining_text, INSTR(remaining_text, '{')), '}') > 0
            THEN SUBSTR(
                    remaining_text, 
                    INSTR(remaining_text, '{') 
                        + INSTR(SUBSTR(remaining_text, INSTR(remaining_text, '{')), '}')
                 )
            ELSE ''
        END AS remaining_text,
        -- Extract the current token from { to }
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(remaining_text, '{') > 0 
                 AND INSTR(SUBSTR(remaining_text, INSTR(remaining_text, '{')), '}') > 0
            THEN SUBSTR(
                    remaining_text, 
                    INSTR(remaining_text, '{'), 
                    INSTR(SUBSTR(remaining_text, INSTR(remaining_text, '{')), '}')
                 )
            ELSE ''
        END AS token,
        token_count + 1
    FROM extract_tokens
    WHERE INSTR(remaining_text, '{') > 0
      AND INSTR(SUBSTR(remaining_text, INSTR(remaining_text, '{')), '}') > 0
)
SELECT 
    id,
    original_text,
    GROUP_CONCAT(token, '') AS all_tokens,
    COUNT(token) AS token_count
FROM extract_tokens
WHERE token != ''
GROUP BY id, original_text
ORDER BY id

WITH paired AS (

        pv1.session_id,
        pv1.post_id,
        pv1.ts AS start_time,
        MIN(pv2.ts) AS end_time
    FROM view_logs AS pv1
    JOIN view_logs AS pv2
        ON pv1.session_id = pv2.session_id
        AND pv1.post_id = pv2.post_id
        AND pv1.event_name = 'view_start'
        AND pv2.event_name = 'view_end'
        AND pv1.ts < pv2.ts
    GROUP BY pv1.session_id, pv1.post_id, pv1.ts
),
cte AS (
    SELECT 
        p.session_id,
        p.post_id,
        p.start_time,
        p.end_time,
        vl.view_perc
    FROM paired p
    JOIN view_logs vl
        ON p.session_id = vl.session_id
        AND p.post_id = vl.post_id
        AND p.end_time = vl.ts
        AND vl.event_name = 'view_end'
)
SELECT 
    session_id,

    start_time,
